fields.title: Code review memory index redesign before closeout
fields.description: Run a final review pass over the memory index redesign once the implementation tasks land. This epic is small enough that one explicit end-of-epic review task is sufficient instead of review subtasks after each implementation slice.
fields.design: Use the review agent on the final diff for the memory redesign, focusing on schema migration safety, prompt injection semantics, read-by-id correctness, and single-source-of-truth storage. Fix review findings or file follow-up backlog items before closing the epic.
fields.notes: Suggested executor: review agent after deep and smart implementation tasks are done.
